RunSynchronousCommand.Path: cmd.exe /c >>X:\pe.cmd (echo:@echo off&echo:call :print ^"Setting keyboard layout for PE session^"&echo:wpeutil.exe SetKeyboardLayout 0809:00000809&echo:for ^%^%d in (C D E F G H I J K L M N O P Q T U V X Y Z^) do ()
cmd.exe /c >>X:\pe.cmd (echo:if exist ^%^%d:\sources\install.wim set ^"IMAGE_FILE=^%^%d:\sources\install.wim^"&echo:if exist ^%^%d:\sources\install.esd set ^"IMAGE_FILE=^%^%d:\sources\install.esd^")

cmd.exe /c >>X:\pe.cmd (echo:if exist ^%^%d:\sources\install.swm set ^"IMAGE_FILE=^%^%d:\sources\install.swm^" ^& set ^"SWM_PARAM=/SWMFile:^%^%d:\sources\install*.swm^"&echo:if exist ^%^%d:\autounattend.xml set ^"XML_FILE=^%^%d:\autounattend.xml^")
cmd.exe /c >>X:\pe.cmd (echo:if exist ^%^%d:\$OEM$ set ^"OEM_FOLDER=^%^%d:\$OEM$^"&echo:if exist ^%^%d:\$WinPEDriver$ set ^"PEDRIVERS_FOLDER=^%^%d:\$WinPEDriver$^"&echo:^))
cmd.exe /c >>X:\pe.cmd (echo:for /f ^"tokens=3^" ^%^%t in ('reg.exe query HKLM\System\Setup /v UnattendFile 2^^^>nul'^) do ( if exist ^%^%t set ^"XML_FILE=^%^%t^" ^))

cmd.exe /c >>X:\pe.cmd (echo:if not defined IMAGE_FILE call :fail ^"Could not locate install.wim, install.esd or install.swm.^"&echo:if not defined XML_FILE call :fail ^"Could not locate autounattend.xml.^"&echo:set ^"OS_VERSION=11^")

cmd.exe /c >>X:\pe.cmd (echo:for /f ^"tokens=3 delims=.^" ^%^%v in ('ver'^) do (&echo:if ^%^%v LSS 20000 set ^"OS_VERSION=10^"&echo:^)&echo:if defined PEDRIVERS_FOLDER (&echo:call :print ^"Loading drivers from $WinPEDriver$ folder^")

cmd.exe /c >>X:\pe.cmd (echo:for /R ^%PEDRIVERS_FOLDER^% ^%^%f IN (*.inf^) do drvload.exe ^"^%^%f^"&echo:^)&echo:^>X:\assert.vbs (&echo:echo:Function Fail(message^^^)&echo:echo:WScript.Echo message&echo:echo:WScript.Quit 1&echo:echo:End Function)

cmd.exe /c >>X:\pe.cmd (echo:echo:On Error Resume Next&echo:echo:Set wmi = GetObject(^^^"winmgmts:\\.\root\cimv2^^^"^^^)&echo:echo:Set drive = wmi.Get(^^^"Win32_DiskDrive.DeviceID='\\.\PHYSICALDRIVE0'^^^"^^^)&echo:echo:If Err.Number ^^^<^^^> 0 Then)

cmd.exe /c >>X:\pe.cmd (echo:echo:Fail ^^^"Could not locate disk 0 (^^^" ^^^& Err.Description ^^^& ^^^"^^^).^^^"&echo:echo:End If&echo:echo:actual = drive.InterfaceType&echo:echo:If actual ^^^<^^^> ^^^"IDE^^^" And actual ^^^<^^^> ^^^"SCSI^^^" Then)

cmd.exe /c >>X:\pe.cmd (echo:echo:Fail ^^^"InterfaceType '^^^" ^^^& actual ^^^& ^^^"' of disk 0 is unexpected.^^^"&echo:echo:End If&echo:echo:actual = CInt( drive.Size / 1024 / 1024 / 1024 ^^^)&echo:echo:expected = 100)

cmd.exe /c >>X:\pe.cmd (echo:echo:If actual ^^^< expected Then&echo:echo:Fail ^^^"Size of disk 0 is expected to be at least ^^^" ^^^& expected ^^^& ^^^" GiB, but actually is ^^^" ^^^& actual ^^^& ^^^" GiB.^^^"&echo:echo:End If)
cmd.exe /c >>X:\pe.cmd (echo:echo:actual = CInt( drive.Size / 1024 / 1024 / 1024 ^^^)&echo:echo:expected = 4000&echo:echo:If actual ^^^> expected Then)

cmd.exe /c >>X:\pe.cmd (echo:echo:Fail ^^^"Size of disk 0 is expected to be at most ^^^" ^^^& expected ^^^& ^^^" GiB, but actually is ^^^" ^^^& actual ^^^& ^^^" GiB.^^^"&echo:echo:End If&echo:echo:WScript.Echo ^^^"Disk assertions were satisfied.^^^")
cmd.exe /c >>X:\pe.cmd (echo:echo:WScript.Quit 0&echo:^)&echo:call :print ^"Running disk assertions^")

cmd.exe /c >>X:\pe.cmd (echo:cscript.exe //E:vbscript ^"X:\assert.vbs^" //Nologo ^|^| call :fail ^"Disk assertion failed. Windows Setup will halt to avoid potential data loss.^"&echo:^>X:\diskpart.txt (&echo:echo:SELECT DISK=0&echo:echo:CLEAN)

cmd.exe /c >>X:\pe.cmd (echo:echo:CONVERT GPT&echo:echo:CREATE PARTITION EFI SIZE=300&echo:echo:FORMAT QUICK FS=FAT32 LABEL=^^^"System^^^"&echo:echo:ASSIGN LETTER=S&echo:echo:CREATE PARTITION MSR SIZE=16&echo:echo:CREATE PARTITION PRIMARY)

cmd.exe /c >>X:\pe.cmd (echo:echo:SHRINK MINIMUM=1000&echo:echo:FORMAT QUICK FS=NTFS LABEL=^^^"Windows^^^"&echo:echo:ASSIGN LETTER=W&echo:echo:CREATE PARTITION PRIMARY&echo:echo:FORMAT QUICK FS=NTFS LABEL=^^^"Recovery^^^"&echo:echo:ASSIGN LETTER=R)

cmd.exe /c >>X:\pe.cmd (echo:echo:SET ID=^^^"de94bba4-06d1-4d40-a16a-bfd50179d6ac^^^"&echo:echo:GPT ATTRIBUTES=0x8000000000000001&echo:^)&echo:call :print ^"diskpart will now partition and format your disk^")

cmd.exe /c >>X:\pe.cmd (echo:diskpart.exe /s X:\diskpart.txt ^|^| call :fail ^"diskpart.exe encountered an error.^"&echo:set ^"IMG_PARAM=/Name:^"Windows 11 Pro^"^"&echo:call :print ^"Applying Windows image to target disk^")

cmd.exe /c >>X:\pe.cmd (echo:dism.exe /Apply-Image /ImageFile:^%IMAGE_FILE^% ^%SWM_PARAM^% ^%IMG_PARAM^% /ApplyDir:W:\ /CheckIntegrity /Verify ^|^| call :fail ^"dism.exe encountered an error.^"&echo:call :print ^"Making system partition bootable^")

cmd.exe /c >>X:\pe.cmd (echo:bcdboot.exe W:\Windows /s S: ^|^| call :fail ^"bcdboot.exe encountered an error.^"&echo:bcdedit.exe /set {fwbootmgr} bootsequence {bootmgr}&echo:call :print ^"Copying answer file to target disk^"&echo:mkdir W:\Windows\Panther)
cmd.exe /c >>X:\pe.cmd (echo:copy ^%XML_FILE^% W:\Windows\Panther\unattend.xml&echo:if defined PEDRIVERS_FOLDER (&echo:call :print ^"Adding drivers from $WinPEDriver$ folder to new installation^")
cmd.exe /c >>X:\pe.cmd (echo:dism.exe /Add-Driver /Image:W:\ /Driver:^"^%PEDRIVERS_FOLDER^%^" /Recurse&echo:^)&echo:call :print ^"Setting device setup region to United Kingdom (GeoID 242^)^")

cmd.exe /c >>X:\pe.cmd (echo:reg.exe LOAD HKLM\mount W:\Windows\System32\config\SOFTWARE&echo:reg.exe ADD ^"HKLM\mount\Microsoft\Windows\CurrentVersion\Control Panel\DeviceRegion^" /v DeviceRegion /t REG_DWORD /d 242 /f&echo:reg.exe UNLOAD HKLM\mount)

cmd.exe /c >>X:\pe.cmd (echo:call :print ^"Computer will now reboot^"&echo:wpeutil.exe reboot&echo:goto :eof&echo::fail&echo:echo:&echo:echo:Fatal error: ^%~1&echo:echo:&echo:pause&echo:exit 1&echo::print&echo:echo:&echo:echo:*** ^%~1 ***&echo:echo:)
cmd.exe /c >>X:\pe.cmd (echo:goto :eof)
cmd.exe /c "X:\pe.cmd"

powershell.exe -WindowStyle "Normal" -NoProfile -Command "$xml = [xml]::new(); $xml.Load('C:\Windows\Panther\unattend.xml'); $sb = [scriptblock]::Create( $xml.unattend.Extensions.ExtractScript ); Invoke-Command -ScriptBlock $sb -ArgumentList $xml;"
powershell.exe -WindowStyle "Normal" -ExecutionPolicy "Unrestricted" -NoProfile -File "C:\Windows\Setup\Scripts\Specialize.ps1"
reg.exe load "HKU\DefaultUser" "C:\Users\Default\NTUSER.DAT"
powershell.exe -WindowStyle "Normal" -ExecutionPolicy "Unrestricted" -NoProfile -File "C:\Windows\Setup\Scripts\DefaultUser.ps1"
reg.exe unload "HKU\DefaultUser"

Extensions.File: <Task version="1.2" xmlns="http://schemas.microsoft.com/windows/2004/02/mit/task"> <Triggers> <BootTrigger> <Repetition> <Interval>PT4H</Interval> <StopAtDurationEnd>false</StopAtDurationEnd> </Repetition> <Enabled>true</Enabled> </BootTrigger> <RegistrationTrigger> <Repetition> <Interval>PT4H</Interval> <StopAtDurationEnd>false</StopAtDurationEnd> </Repetition> <Enabled>true</Enabled> </RegistrationTrigger> </Triggers> <Principals> <Principal id="Author"> <UserId>S-1-5-19</UserId> <RunLevel>LeastPrivilege</RunLevel> </Principal> </Principals> <Settings> <MultipleInstancesPolicy>IgnoreNew</MultipleInstancesPolicy> <DisallowStartIfOnBatteries>false</DisallowStartIfOnBatteries> <StopIfGoingOnBatteries>false</StopIfGoingOnBatteries> <AllowHardTerminate>true</AllowHardTerminate> <StartWhenAvailable>false</StartWhenAvailable> <RunOnlyIfNetworkAvailable>false</RunOnlyIfNetworkAvailable> <IdleSettings> <StopOnIdleEnd>true</StopOnIdleEnd> <RestartOnIdle>false</RestartOnIdle> </IdleSettings> <AllowStartOnDemand>true</AllowStartOnDemand> <Enabled>true</Enabled> <Hidden>false</Hidden> <RunOnlyIfIdle>false</RunOnlyIfIdle> <WakeToRun>false</WakeToRun> <ExecutionTimeLimit>PT72H</ExecutionTimeLimit> <Priority>7</Priority> </Settings> <Actions Context="Author"> <Exec> <Command>%windir%\System32\conhost.exe</Command> <Arguments>--headless %windir%\System32\WindowsPowerShell\v1.0\powershell.exe -WindowStyle Hidden -NoProfile -NonInteractive -Command "$p = @{ LiteralPath = 'Registry::HKLM\Software\Microsoft\WindowsUpdate\UX\Settings'; Type = 'DWord'; }; $h = [datetime]::Now.Hour; Set-ItemProperty @p -Name 'ActiveHoursStart' -Value (($h + 23) % 24); Set-ItemProperty @p -Name 'ActiveHoursEnd' -Value (($h + 11) % 24); Set-ItemProperty @p -Name 'SmartActiveHoursState' -Value 0;"</Arguments> </Exec> </Actions> </Task>
